sequence_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/annoyed.png
sequence_0.dialogue: Ew, [color=pink]Convicts[/color]. I really hate these guys.

sequence_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
sequence_0.dialogue: You best watch out for them too. They'll try to grab me right out of your hands and then we'd [i]both[/i] be screwed.

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/annoyed.png
sequence_1.dialogue: Damn it! The main elevator is completely smashed. There's no way we can get out of here using this!

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/sad.png
sequence_1.dialogue: I don't want to sit here at the bottom of a giant hole forever...

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
sequence_1.dialogue: Actually, there is a maintenance elevator nearby which might still be working. We should be able to get to it through a vent in the nearby guard office.

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
sequence_1.dialogue: I mean, the maintenance elevator could also be broken, and we would have to fight our way there through soooo many guards, so if you wanted to just...

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png

options.option: You're right, it's not worth the risk.

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
sequence_1.dialogue: Okay! Off we go towards the guards then!

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/derp.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
sequence_1.dialogue: I would never want to keep you here. Haha.

sequence_1.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png

sequence_2.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
sequence_2.dialogue: Hi honey! We should totally go out on a date like that one in the elevator again!

sequence_2.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
sequence_2.dialogue: We had such a good time together!

options.option: Can we not do this right now?!

sequence_2.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/sad.png
sequence_2.dialogue: You didn't have to be mean about it...

sequence_2.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
sequence_2.dialogue: Yay! Let's talk about this later though, you've gotta deal with these guys.
